scores.correctness_notes: Agent describes TLS v4 (older ops-based library) rather than v1 (charmlibs-interfaces-tls-certificates). Gets CertificateAvailableEvent correct but omits CertificateDeniedEvent entirely. Renewal scenarios focus on expiry/secret mechanisms rather than the gold standard's revocation and request_errors patterns.
scores.hallucination_notes: The v4 API described (TLSCertificatesRequiresV4, TLSCertificatesProvidesV4, renewal_relative_time, renew_certificate(), regenerate_private_key()) likely exists in the real v4 library, so not fabricated — but it describes the wrong version. Missing CertificateDeniedEvent is an omission rather than hallucination.
